title: McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
